# Orli

> Orli is a boutique hotel in La Jolla, California — intentional, local-minded, and effortless by design.

Orli (stayorli.com) is an independent boutique hotel at 7753 Draper Ave, La Jolla, CA 92037. The property offers individually themed guest rooms, curated offers and upgrades, local experiences, events, and a journal. The brand philosophy centers on three pillars: intentionality, local connection, and effortless design.

- Phone: +1 (858) 727-2776
- Email: hello@stayorli.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/stayorli/
- Booking system: Mews PMS

---

## Pages

### Homepage
URL: https://stayorli.com/

The homepage is powered by the same flexible content system as all other pages. It typically features a hero section with a booking form, a rooms slider, amenities, the brand mission, a featured journal entry, and a social feed.

### Find Your Room
URL: https://stayorli.com/find-your-room

A filterable grid of all guest rooms. Rooms can be filtered by amenity type. Each room tile shows the room name, a key feature, how many guests it sleeps, a featured image or video, and links to the room detail page.

### Individual Room Pages
URL: https://stayorli.com/rooms/[room-slug]

Each room page includes:
- Hero gallery (desktop) and mobile gallery slider
- Room title, number of guests it sleeps, and description
- Highlights — icon-labeled feature callouts (e.g., balcony, ocean view)
- Features — full amenity list as a bullet list
- Floor plan (optional, toggle to show)
- About Orli section specific to the room
- Neighborhood section with walkability bullets and points of interest
- Reservation form (sidebar on desktop, inline on mobile) integrated with Mews Distributor
- "Back to All Rooms" link

### Offers
URL: https://stayorli.com/offers

A grid or filterable list of current hotel offers and packages.

### Individual Offer Pages
URL: https://stayorli.com/offers/[offer-slug]

Each offer page shows:
- Offer image
- Offer title and description (rich text)
- "Book Now" CTA linking to an external booking URL
- Optional Terms & Conditions in a modal dialog

### Journal (Blog)
URL: https://stayorli.com/journal (slug-based)

A grid of blog posts. Posts are categorized and can be featured. Each post links to its individual post page.

### Individual Post Pages
URL: https://stayorli.com/[post-slug]

Blog posts use the same flexible content section system as pages. They support a Hero with a date published, rich media sections (full-width media, two-up media), content blocks, galleries, and a "More Posts" section at the bottom.

### Experiences
URL: https://stayorli.com/experiences (slug-based)

A grid of curated local experiences available to guests.

### Events
URL: https://stayorli.com/events (slug-based)

A feed and/or slider of hotel and local events. Events include date, time, location, description, RSVP link, and calendar links (Apple, Google).

### Gatherings / Private Events
URL: https://stayorli.com/gatherings (slug-based)

Information on private event hosting at the property. Includes a callout section with media and event listings.

### Upgrades
URL: https://stayorli.com/upgrades (slug-based)

A grid of purchasable room upgrades and add-ons (e.g., The Rise & Shine, The Celebration).

### Amenities
URL: https://stayorli.com/amenities (slug-based)

A slider or grid of property amenities.

### Press
URL: https://stayorli.com/press (slug-based)

A grid of press mentions with publication name, link, and featured image.

### Getting Here
URL: Part of relevant pages via section

Directions, desktop and mobile map images, and travel context for reaching the hotel.

### The Local Way
URL: Part of relevant pages via section

A curated local area guide with an embedded map and categorized lists of nearby restaurants, shops, and points of interest with names, addresses, and coordinates.

### Contact
URL: https://stayorli.com/contact (slug-based)

Contact block with copy for reservations, events, media, and development inquiries, plus a background image.

### Gifts / Shop
URL: https://stayorli.com/gifts (slug-based)

A gift grid showcasing curated products with brand, product name, hover details, and external purchase links.

### FAQ
URL: Part of relevant pages via section

Frequently asked questions in an accordion layout. FAQ data is also emitted as FAQPage schema.org structured data.

### Gallery
URL: https://stayorli.com/gallery (slug-based)

A filterable media gallery supporting both images and video.

### 404
URL: https://stayorli.com/404

Custom not-found page.
